blocking_missing: manifest.ablations.basin_overlap is not true with manifest-declared external ablation evidence
manifest.ablations.barrier_height is not true with manifest-declared external ablation evidence
manifest.ablations.descent_continuity is not true with manifest-declared external ablation evidence
manifest.ablations.risk_calibration is not true with manifest-declared external ablation evidence
manifest.ablations.seam_repair is not true with manifest-declared external ablation evidence

checks.detail: local ablation variants are present in results/ablation_metrics.csv and bound in work orders
checks.name: work_orders_use_local_reference_variants

checks.detail: each work order binds same configs/resets/interfaces/budget, JSONL/video artifacts, manifest ablation booleans, and strict acceptance commands
checks.name: work_orders_are_actionable_and_artifact_bound

checks.detail: strict ablation commands preserve collection-to-manifest gate order
checks.name: operator_commands_cover_collection_manifest_rollout_and_strict_evidence

checks.detail: external_validation/manifest.json remains absent before real evidence
checks.name: no_real_manifest_written

work_orders.acceptance_commands: python scripts\build_external_ablation_collection_packet.py | python scripts\audit_external_collection_readiness.py --strict --backend-module <module_or_path> --task-config-dir external_validation\configs --run-id <specific_run_id> --unsealed-alias-map | python external_validation\runner\real_collection_runner.py --backend-module <module_or_path> --task-config-dir external_validation\configs --output-log-dir external_validation\logs --video-dir external_validation\videos --run-id <specific_run_id> --unsealed-alias-map | python scripts\build_external_postcollection_evidence_seal.py --backend-module <module_or_path> --run-id <specific_run_id> --operator-id <operator_or_lab> --collection-machine <machine_or_robot_platform> --date-sealed <YYYY-MM-DD> | python scripts\audit_external_postcollection_seal_consistency.py | python scripts\build_external_manifest.py --write --check-video-paths | python scripts\validate_external_rollouts.py --write-results --check-video-paths --strict | python scripts\audit_external_evidence.py --strict
work_orders.operator_input: run this ablated variant on the same accepted task configs, skill library, reset ids, initial-state hashes, observation interface, and compute budget as the primary method
